source: our canonical availability read — the reconciled official-report + live-feed picture our projections use
headline: 29 out · 4 questionable across 15 teams, as our projections read it right now.

groups.label: Out
groups.blurb: Ruled out — our projection redistributes their minutes to the rest of the rotation.

players.note: Jul 18: Paopao (leg) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Sky.
Jun 27: Carrington (foot) will remain on the inactive list for Sunday's game against the Aces.
May 19: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.
Jul 14: Head coach Tyler Marsh said Tuesday that Diggins (knee) is without a timetable for a return, Alissa Hirsh of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.
Jul 17: Morrow (reconditioning) is out for Friday's game against the Mercury.
Jul 18: Jackson (coach's decision) will remain on the inactive list for Friday's game against the Mercury.

Jul 18: Jocyte is out for Saturday's game against the Mystics due to left foot soreness.

Jul 15: Barker (leg) will be sidelined for the rest of the 2026 season, Callie Fin of USA Today reports.
Jul 12: Bell has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Fever due to a right leg injury.
Jul 13: Latson (coach's decision) won't play Sunday against the Fever.
May 15: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.
Jul 18: King (coach's decision) is out for Saturday's game versus Portland.
Jul 1: Collier (ankle) has been cleared to resume practices with the Lynx, the team announced Wednesday.
Jul 17: Fiebich (foot) currently doesn't have a timetable to return, Jackie Powell of The IX Sports reports.
Jun 28: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.
Jul 18: Mack (foot) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Sun.
Jul 18: Carter (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Sun.

Jul 17: Gustafson (personal) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Lynx.
Jul 9: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.
Jul 12: Magbegor (face) was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be "reevaluated in the next couple of weeks," Percy Allen of the Seattle Times reports.
Jul 16: Mair (coach's decision) is listed out for Friday's game against Indiana.
Jul 16: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Sykes (foot) has taken part in individual work at practice recently, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.

Jul 16: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Rice (ankle) has progressed to doing non-contact work at practice but is doubtful to return before the All-Star break, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.

groups.label: Questionable / day-to-day
groups.blurb: A real chance to play, at a reduced role — our projection carries a partial play chance.

players.note: Jul 18: Smith (leg) is doubtful for Sunday's game against the Sparks.

note: This is the availability our projections assume, reconciled from the official injury reports and our live feed — not injury news itself. “Questionable / day-to-day” players still carry a real play chance; “out” players have their minutes redistributed. A row marked “read from the latest report” is one where our read is fresher than the raw feed status.
empty_note: No players are currently listed out or questionable across the league — a clean bill of health is the normal, good state.
